description:
The TrailLifetimeFromSizeInitializer component will give trails a lifetime depending on how much more or less size they have compared to a ref size.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.ReferenceSize: The size to reference a trail size against when making a trail's lifetime.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
